entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: Cultivated peanut (Arachis hypogaea L.), an important oil crop cultivated in over 100 countries

entities.name: SEED TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of peanut seeds whose genetic loci and associated genes are being studied

entities.name: GENOMIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of genetic characteristics within the cultivated peanut population

entities.name: EVOLUTION
entities.description: The genetic change and history of the peanut species over time

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE
entities.description: The distribution of genetic variation within and among peanut populations

entities.name: DEMOGRAPHIC HISTORY
entities.description: The historical changes in population size and composition of peanuts

entities.name: SIGNATURES OF SELECTION
entities.description: Genomic evidence of selective pressure occurring during peanut improvement breeding

entities.name: IMPROVEMENT BREEDING
entities.description: The process of enhancing peanut traits through selective breeding

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Specific genes identified as potentially associated with seed traits

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: Genetic variations at a single position in the DNA sequence used for genomic analysis

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE RESEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of sequencing the entire genome of multiple individuals to identify variations

entities.name: GENOMIC SCAN ANALYSES
entities.description: Analyses applied to identify selective loci for breeding

entities.name: SELECTIVE LOCI
entities.description: Specific genomic regions showing evidence of selection

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach that uses genomic information to select for desired traits

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDIES
entities.description: A method used to identify associations between genetic variants and specific traits

entities.name: TRANSGENIC EXPERIMENTS
entities.description: Experiments used to verify the functions of candidate genes

entities.name: RNA-SEQ
entities.description: A sequencing method used to analyze gene expression and identify candidate genes
